review: Location is prime. First impression with greeting and assistance by doorman bell boy is commendable. Love the warm welcome and smiles! Received a welcome drink while waiting for check in and the check in process didn't take too long. Water pressure in the bathroom was superb aircon in room works well. Had a relaxing spa session at the in hotel spa facility. Overall, we enjoyed our stay and would love to come back again.
Overall great experience, rooms are specious and comfortable. Breakfast is also good. Just in front of Pavilion Shopping Mall. Outside area is little crowded but insight the environment is relaxed.
We have been staying at the same hotel when we we visit KL. It s our home away from home for us. This round we decided to join the loyalty program of the hotel.
Buffet breakfast was excellent Room was spacious Allows instant upgrade and early check in

Excellent stay! The staff truly pamper you from arrival to departure. From the warm welcome and smooth check in to housekeeping and breakfast, every detail is thoughtfully taken care of. The location is perfect, with plenty of restaurants, shops, and markets nearby. What really makes this hotel special is the amazing hospitality of the entire team. I would happily stay here again. Kudos to all the staff, and thank you for a wonderful experience!
Best location Clean rooms Good breakfast Professional staff
Friendly staff and the manager is attentive to my concerns. Thank you for the assist.
Location of the hotel was the best, directly opposite Pavilion Bukit Bintang.
Everything was neat and clean with daily room clean service
Perfect location, great staff and amazing rooms
Everything about the hotel was SUPERB especially the spa
Well Train Staff , special credit to Mark , very smart guy
I loved their service

Excellent location in the heart of Kuala Lumpur, especially for shopping and walking around Bukit Bintang. The staff were professional and welcoming, and the overall atmosphere was calm and comfortable.
Location rooms
The location and the staff
The location, facilities, and staff were all amazing for the price, making my first trip to Malaysia so joyful and pleasant. I would definitely stay here again.
The vibe, the hospitality of the staff towards us
The location is perfect. Friendly staff. Clean.
The spa, pool and room are marvelous. We enjoy every moment of our stay. The breakfast is superb!
Strategic location, staff are all very friendly and helpful. Fast check in check out. Breakfast is delicious

Staff. All was excellent. One of the staff came to my room and bring the cake for birthday amenities. He sang the song from the door to the seat. So fun! The ladies at the counter for check in also was excellent. She upgrade my room and request for birthday amenities that she can do.

We had another excellent stay at JW Marriott Kuala Lumpur. This was our second time staying at the hotel, and we were pleasantly surprised to receive a complimentary upgrade to a room on the 18th floor with a lovely pool view. The room was spacious, comfortable, and impeccably clean, making it a great place to relax after a day out in the city. The location is hard to beat. Situated in the heart of Bukit Bintang and directly opposite Pavilion Kuala Lumpur, it offers easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment options. Check in and check out were seamless, and the staff were consistently friendly, professional, and attentive throughout our stay. We always felt welcomed and well looked after. Overall, JW Marriott Kuala Lumpur continues to impress with its excellent service, comfortable accommodations, and unbeatable location. We would not hesitate to stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting Kuala Lumpur.
The hotel in general is perfect the staff are very welcoming. Especially Junu she is great

1. The strategic location 2.incredible services by each and every hotel staff they really have done very well especially Efam who assisted us with check ins and Jerome the server at Shook 3.spacious bathroom with a separate dressing table 4. fast and efficient elevator 5.single beds which see big enough for two person actually! 6. Very good hotel breakfast.
The staff are super welcoming. Awi helped us during check in, he managed to get us our room earlier after a long flight. The location is perfect! Easily accessible
The staff, their flexibility and great service. I had a late flight and the staff treated outstanding even if I was already checked out. It s my 3th time in this hotel.

The staff were brilliant, they gave me the room 3 hours earllier than check in time even though I could see that the hotel was extremely busy at noontime. Location of the hotel is unbeatable, right in the middle of the action of Bukit Bintang shopping area. Easy walking distance to the best eating areas. My room on the 24th floor was clean and spacious and very well decorated.

Great experience, warm and friendly staff. From Concierge to Receptionists. Thanks To Sara and Jason....Breakfast was delicious with a good variety... Miya and May and the whole crew... Thank you for making our stay memorable
Nice and clean room. Excellence hospitality from Xin Ru when check in.
Clean and quiet
Location is perfect, breakfast is above average
Near city center
Was allowed to check in 2hours earlier plus upgrade our room. Provided a birthday cake, due to wife's birthday. Very thoughtful. Will definitely stay again.
Amazing staff, they hold very high standards.
The room ....infront of city view .Front Desk staff are very humble and caring .

My daughter and I recently spent three nights at JW Marriott Kuala Lumpur at Bukit Bintang, and our stay was made truly memorable by Nijhum at the reception, whose hospitality went far beyond anything we expected. From the moment we checked in, Nijhum took genuine care of us. She kindly arranged complimentary breakfast for both of us for our entire stay, which was such a warm and unexpected gesture. Throughout our trip she helped us arrange taxis, guided us to sensible and good value shopping areas, recommended places worth visiting, and pointed us towards wonderful local food. As a mother travelling alone with my daughter in an unfamiliar city, having someone so attentive, kind, and trustworthy at the front desk gave me real peace of mind. This level of warmth and personal attention is rare. Nijhum represents the very best of what hospitality should be, and she is a real asset to the JW Marriott team. The hotel itself was excellent clean, comfortable, and beautifully located but it was Nijhum s personal care that elevated our experience from a pleasant stay into a memorable one. Thank you, Nijhum. We will not forget your kindness, and we will certainly return.
I loved the location.
The staff were nice, polite and helpful. We were very satisfied with the services and the breakfast buffet was prefect with a wide variety of foods,
Room was very comfortable, breakfast selection was excellent, and pleased there was a bar open downstairs for a glass of win on our arrival at 11pm!
Facilities and staff are excellent
This is a regular stay place for the last 6 years I have been visiting KL. Nice property with good facilities

We recently stayed at the JW Marriott Hotel Kuala Lumpur for 2 nights to celebrate our 2nd wedding anniversary, and it was truly a memorable experience. From the moment we checked in, the service was exceptional. The staff were warm, attentive, and genuinely made us feel welcomed throughout our stay. To our pleasant surprise, we were upgraded to a nicer room, which made our celebration even more special. The room was beautifully maintained, comfortable, and had everything we needed for a relaxing stay. Every detail, from cleanliness to amenities, was on point. The overall ambience of the hotel added a touch of luxury to our anniversary celebration. Thank you to the entire team for making our special occasion even more meaningful. We truly appreciate the hospitality and will definitely be back again. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a comfortable and memorable stay!
Clean n comfy
Location and staff

Location which is exactly opposite the Pavilion. Buffet breakfast was nice as well. Staff was very courteous. The restaurant manager recommended me Malaysian tea Ta Tariq which I which I loved. Keep up the good work team JW Marriott.
Excellent location, friendly staff, great buffet food and great for family

We liked the size of the room and the fact the adjoining room was rather large as well by Asian standards. The location of the hotel within Bukit Bintang was excellent opposite to Pavillion. The pool area was good to relax in. We didn't try the in house restaurants as there is plenty of eating options everywhere you look.
I like the property s proximity to the mall. There are many shops and restaurants near the hotel.

Fantastic location surrounded by malls in the heart of Bukit Bintang also adjacent to posh Star Hills restaurants shops and services. Spacious and clean room. Superb staff, very attentive and friendly with a smile. Very welcoming. Breakfast was delicious and plentiful. The only thing is missing Kueh Malay traditional cake. We had a very pleasant stay indeed at Marriott KL also at any other Marriott around the world.
BREAKFAST WAS GREAT, STAFF WERE VERY POLITE AND ALWAYS ON HAND EXCENT SERVICE

Location is great, the property is very clean and staff are very friendly and hospitable,, particularly Mr. Efarn from reception, Rash Vellu the senior duty manager, Rup, Ronel AYS and Bishany from Room Service department. Staff were extremely cooperative and make your life easy. Thank you
Location excellent. Staff always give their best to help with customers inquiries or queries. Keep up the good work.
stay was extremely comfortable and location was great
Friendly st aff
The staff was exceptionally helpful and looked after my needs until my room was available. I liked the location too. It was exciting and so close to shopping.
Clean, Modern, Great Location, Good facilities, Great Breakfast, Pool and Gym excellent.
The services are top notch! Love how cosy and homely the room is. It s also accessible and very close to pavilion
I took my breakfast outside but i know food here is awesome. Location is perfect.

I always choose JW Marriott KL whenever I m in Kuala Lumpur, simply because the location is unbeatable. It s right next to Pavilion and close to everything, including amazing food options. Even the restaurant bar inside are quality. I really love this hotel the rooms are beautifully designed, very comfortable, and the view is absolutely stunning. It s the perfect place to relax after a busy day in the city. The service is consistently excellent, with attentive staff who make you feel welcome every time. The overall atmosphere is both luxurious and warm, which makes every stay special. Highly recommended, and I ll definitely keep coming back.
Location staff whole experience

For me the best place to stay in KL. The staff are amazing and made sure I had a very comfortable and enjoyable stay. My room was spacious and comfortable and facilities such as the spa and pool are maintained to a high standard. The hotel is in a great location in the heart of Bukit Bintang with its many restaurants and shops.
Customer service was excellent

Love the location. Love the staff. The hotel room was soooo spacious and clean and nice. I would definitely recommend everyone to book this. Pavilion is literally opposite to the hotel. Everything 10 10
Lacking personality Location Hectic but empty at same time. Weird bar on lower level just playing fashion ads when they could have been playing music fifa wc
Run down luxury hotel. In heart of Bukit Bintang Run down with the mini fridge not cold, coffee machine not working, some switches not in working state. The worst is the pillows, super uncomfy.
Pleasant Location The rooms are very noisy
Pleasant Location. Housekeeping is very loud noise . The pillow is very flat even stack up few pieces .....

Six of one, half a dozen of the other Great location, close to all attractions in KL. Lots on offer in the hotel and very close surrounds My review is balanced in that we had a cleanliness issue that was immediately resolve by the manager Gayatri on duty and amazing added benefit to make our stay more comfortable. However on our last night we had a really crabby and sick baby and the hotel night manager called our room to tell us to keep the baby quiet because the guest next door couldn t sleep. This left us with a terrible feeling because nursing a young crabby baby is stressful to parents and made my wife feel extremely upset. We raised it upon check out and it wasn t handled well because we were simply told write a review

It was unpleasant stay for me Great location Firstly, I experienced issues with the shower head, which was not functioning properly. Additionally, the bedsheets did not feel as clean as expected, as there appeared to be some dust present. I also found the breakfast experience disappointing. While the food itself was of good quality, the overall arrangement and replenishment were insufficient. Many items ran out quickly, and it felt quite difficult to access the food comfortably. Lastly, I felt a noticeable difference in the level of service provided to me compared to other guests. It gave me the impression that I was treated differently, possibly due to being a local guest. I hope this is not reflective of your service standards, as all guests should be treated with equal courtesy and respect.

Pleasant The breakfast and the staff at the pool The front desk staff are extremely unhelpful. They didn't have our rooms ready at 3 which is standard check in time and we had to wait another 2 hours to checkin. They couldn't give us an exact time and refused to help any further. V disappointing

Delayed checked in that cause unhappiness. Our check in was delayed for 2 hours!!! One of our room is not ready at 3pm. Front staff told us to wait but didn t say wait for how long. By 5pm we still don t have our room, staff claimed that because we requested for a room that is closed to lift but we already said we only need one room to be closed to the lift which we already did. Yet they still make us wait for more than 2 hours and did not give us any reply. Which is super ridiculous when this happen at Jw Marriott .
The staff and the location was good The location was great The bathroom was not clean properly
Pleasant Location right in city centre There is a huge column in the middle of the room

The room we were offered is way below the standard of a hotel with the JW Marriott Brand. The breakfast is good. The location is great. When booking.com advertises a room, it would be ideal if they can mention on which level the rooms are located. We were offered a room on the second floor with no view. The staffs at the reception are the worst you can expect as a tourist in a foreign country. All they can do is just apologise but they never have a solution.

It was okay. Location and food! Stayed here because im taking my mom who is on a wheelchair as she wants to visit KL. Its located right in front of Pavilion and along the streets of Bukit Bintang. Breakfast at the hotel was excellent. The staff are not friendly. They dont respond to enquiry made on booking.com. I informed them prior that im with a senior citizen on a wheelchair. We checked in at 2pm and room wasnt ready. Its okay, we understand on this and their staff told us that he will call us when the room is ready. So I brought my mom who is on a wheelchair to Pavilion. We waited until 5.30 and still no call. Went to the hotel and a different staff came and told us our room was ready at 3.30pm. How is this convenient? Be more friendly please. And when you said you ll call, please call.

Avoid the New Year stay Good location, comfortable bed , room is spacious and clean. Breakfast is good but so crowded due to the new year period. Bonus points for the concierge staff who are super helpful, helping us to get the grab to the airport. Thank you. 2nd time stay at this hotel. But this time we did not enjoy our time. It s super crowded and noisy. Will try to stay a bit further out from Bukit Bintang next time.

A peaceful and private stay with a quiet environment, but the overall experience did not fully meet I appreciate the quiet and private environment provided however, other aspects of the stay did not fully meet our expectations. As this was an anniversary stay, we were hoping for a special experience. Unfortunately, it did not meet our expectations and there was no surprise or thoughtful arrangement.

Pleasant The location. And the check in lady was very nice The showers were incredible. How freezing cold the corridors to the rooms were. One of our rooms had a faux wall and no natural light coming in. Even with our ac turned off and blankets on, we were cold in the night.
Pleasant Location Very basic
Pleasant Location is very good They don t have a kids menu,always prioritizing bonvoy members.

one time enough. unlikely to go another time due to the sound proof problem. location was good, room was clean and look nice but the sound proof was bad, can hear next room snoring throughout the night, resulted in no sleep for me the whole night. Breakfast was ok, but some dishes were too salty, especially nasi lemak sambal and egg omelet. improve sound proof

JW Marriott Bukit Bintang has the most baffling elevator logic I ve encountered! Nice rooms, nice swimming pool, and the location is great, if you need to be in that location otherwise traffic to get to and leave from can be a hassle . As someone who spends over 200 nights a year in hotels across Asia, I ve stayed at this property some 15 20 times. Yet, every visit, I find myself frustrated by the elevators. For example, you can be waiting on a floor while two lifts sit idle just below you, unmoving. You wait and wait only for an elevator from several floors away to finally arrive. This isn t an isolated incident after spending just a short time here, you ll quickly realize how inefficient the entire lift system is. The check in tablets seem ancient and they dont work properly. The rain shower in my room was splashing water all across the bathroom. Breakfast buffet does not serve cold cuts
Not bad. Not up to normal Marriott standards though so not worth the price. Location is excellent, staff are friendly. Not cleaned under the bed. Issues with lights in room.
Pleasant Location Not JW Marriott standard.
Not really up to the usual Marriott standard. Poor internet which stopped working completely twice during the 3 day stay
Ok Was good but more vegetarian options would be great Initial check in..we jad booked for a superior twin room and we were given a basic room. Thats not a good hotels thing to do

Passable Location is convenient for walking but difficult for cars to reach. Room size and breakfast variety was good Check in was very slow. Hotel is nice but seems dated and inefficient for such a large hotel lifts were very slow. Did not having filtered water taps only 2 bottled provided . After checkin I also had to go follow up my luggage as it was not delivered to my room
Passable The location is the biggest advantage Room was big enough and kept clean Check in experience was lengthy Breakfast time was a chaos food at breakfast was not tasty

Pleasant location is great. Just opposite pavilion. Walking distance to everywhere The lift was tedious. There are 6 lifts, but We waited full 5mins for a lift..

Passable The relaxing environment. Quite environment. The breakfast have not many choices of food. The menu food not follow the specification of five star hotel. Longer waiting time to line up for breakfast and closed fast. Room was bit dust.
good location but just do breakfast outside the location the room was dusty for a suite considering the price and breakfast was mid

Pleasant 1. Unprofessional Behavior by the Duty Manager During check in, the duty manager was disrespectful and dismissive, showing no concern for the inconvenience caused. 2. Excessive Waiting Time I was forced to wait over two hours in the lobby without any proactive assistance, updates, or even basic hospitality .This was a complete waste of my time and reflects poorly on your guest service standards. 3. Uncomfortable Conditions The hallways and elevators were ere extremely hot, making the environment not only uncomfortable but also potentially unsafe. 4. Undisclosed Additional Charges I was charged an unexpected tax fee that was not mentioned at the time of my advance booking ,which I consider misleading and unethical.

Wouldn t stay here again Rooms are good and housekeeping team worked well Long wait for the lift, if you stay on higher floor not good, breakfast selection is basic, broken coffee machines, staff not proactive , long queue to check in , very crowded hotel

Pleasant Nice pool and good breakfast. We booked gabana room facing the pool, the cleaning of the terrace could be better and definitely quicker. We booked for 2, but had to reming about bathrobes etc. FOR TWO PEOPLE. But the worst thing is that the hotel charged me 20 more booking.com price for services and ignored the booking confirmation.

Not good value for money. location is very good walking distance can reach famous places The room has poor sound insulation. The pillow is too soft and flat. The room wasn't very clean. The facilities are a bit old due to the age of the property. The breakfast selection is limited.

Nice room but disappointing service and ambience. A good location if you want to stay in the heart of KLCC. Close to many malls with lots of dining options. There is a decent spread for breakfast. The room itself is pretty large and has a nice shower area with a small tub, which is good sized only for a kid. There was banging of doors throughout the night in the room we were in. Our room also overlooked the inside of the mall and it was extremely noisy during the day when there were performances, making it difficult for our little one to nap. We complained about the noise to the concierge thrice before we finally got an offer to change our room on the last night, but it was really too late. Our room was also very, very far from the lifts. All in all, a disappointing experience.
Good location in CBD Location Friendly staff Great breakfast Room size More amenities in the room is required

Nice room but your experience may vary based on the room allocated. Good sized room, nice bathroom as well. Conveniently located near a lot of shopping, in the heart of KL. Room was very noisy! There were slamming doors through the night as we were next to the housekeeping room. Requested to change room 3x and only got an offer to change our room on the last night, which was very disappointing!
Passable Location, room The room type that I booked wasn t available at arrival, hotel blamed the travel agency Booking for not confirming the availability of the booked rooms

Passable Location very convenient surrounding with malls monorails station. We are regular guest, this was our 1st worst experienced during check in. We were being servered by an Indian Thin Lady Staff which we didnt asked her name upon check in we were asked for everyone passport My card. After the registration once again we were asked for room payments deposit which we have paid in full for the rooms 2 weeks before check in. Firstly she didnt check in the systems booking department. She assumed that we have not paid yet. 2ndly she asked for tourism tax when we are malaysian card holder which we do not need to pay for it. She does not have the courtesy to appologies to us the mistakes she made.

Not for a long stay Location and staff No FREE parking and i hate shower door
Pleasant It is little expensive for 3 night stay. Should include breakfast for the same price. Apart from that we had very good experience. customer service

Decent, but left much to be desired. Very central location. Breakfast was not bad, decent spread. Room was big, with a nice bathroom my toddler enjoyed the bathtub greatly. We booked the deluxe king room and were assigned room no 3087. It was terrible, the windows faced the shopping mall and there was lots of loud music through the day, making it difficult for us my toddler to take a nap. Our room was also next to the housekeeping room, and the door kept slamming closed multiple times through the night even at 2 or 3am. We requested for a change of room thrice across 2 days before we were finally offered a different room. However, by that time, we only had one night left so it was too troublesome to switch. Room furnishings also looked dated and slightly dusty.

Pleasant Facilitiea and nearby malls. Staff services were not not that good. Especially about rooms booking and location of rooms with families. Lifts waiting time was very long and too crowded at the hotel lobby.

Good location. Acceptable service not really friendly . Badly managed gym Room is spacious. Need to have instruction leaflets on how to operate the television and coffee machine. Very accessible, great restaurants in the area and great staff. Very modern and nicely maintained. Staff was wonderful. A great location to all things that you need. The worst elevators experience in centuries. Due to the high volume people using sometimes only one elevator would be working and it would just take forever.

eful bathroom location Bathroom h severe problems. PEALING CEILING PAINT IN SHOWER.Black mold growing on shower ceiling. Bathroom sink nh drain. it's above pleasant experience overall but hope some facilities could be newer the room is huge and we love the location as it sits in the heart of shopping malls the pillows are very flimsy and the fridge is very worn out

Standard JW Marriott Hotel, but they won't reply your messages. Clean, comfortable and high standard room. They did not check or reply any messages I sent via booking.com. If you guys will not check or reply messages then please disable the message property option.

it was ok. could improve for a 5 star hotel. The location, room was nice. check in staff service is great The system was really lacking there. The baggage concierge was delayed, and the operator cant speak good English to advise on the status. The parking staff was horrendous.
Excellent location and that's all... nothing more Not a 5 star property at all, just a hotel apartment given the name of a hotel The room was big enough
The low floor room has no window that make the stay unpleasant The location is excellent The front desk customer service is inconsistent

Of course the location is the best. Room facilities were old. Hotel needs a serious renovation to stay in 5 star standar Location My room was very much rundown. The carpet on the floor was so old. and i could feel smoke in my room despite the fact that whole hotel supposed to be smoke free.

Only for the location. Bed mattress definitely need a refresh. Location is good if you are keeping your activity area around Bt Bintang area. Getting out of the area with car can be challenging due to heavy traffic along the main road in front of the hotel. Limited TV Channels. The mattress is old and sunken. Can feel the spring of the mattress when lying down. Aircon not working well too. It s either too cold or too hot.
Perfect location but needs refurbishment for a 5star Staff are friendly Rooms and facilities are dated. Pillow case has stain Soap dish was chirped and sink has a big scratch

Pleasant The buffet breakfast is OK with the variety on offer. When we arrive we have to park the car at B4 but the B2 B3 carpark is empty. When we arrive the lobby area is crowded with people checking in out.

Good hotel but staff lacks training in hospitality management. Very spacious rooms and the lighting is exceptional. Location is superb close to malls and shopping street. Breakfast is really good. Staff not knowledgeable Location Location

Great Location! The location is great! Close proximity to everything you need, the malls, restaurants etc., Rooms were silent and bed was comfy. Jubair at the Executive Lounge was very attentive and provided a great service! The staff at the reception were not too welcoming, and the check in process felt exhausting. I was asked to keep a deposit of US 1200 for my 5 night stay which was absurd and had to question and refused to keep that amount as deposit as no hotel which I've travelled to has requested that big amounts as deposits. I paid in full for the stay during check in itself. The staff need to be more polite and kind i feel in my opinion. I have stayed at the JW KL twice before, however i feel the quality of service is dropping.

Does not meet the standard of a Marriot hotel chain Hotel is nicely located in the middle of the city center. The rooms are nice. We booked the hotel in advance and also wanted to pay in advance. When we arrived, we were offered an upgrade, which we accepted. In the end, the price was much higher than initially quoted, which we felt was not very nice. We also wanted to book transportation from the airport to the hotel. I wrote to them 3 times but got no response. We ended up having to take a Grab. No one from the staff apologized for the mistake. Very unproffesional staff, I would not come again
Mediocre The location The bars restaurants are closed too early. There is no mini bar in the room! The room service is fast BUT poor!!!
Not very good No mini Bar lift system needs to be corrected, there was some programming issue look like an Indian hotel coz complete staff was Indian very bad room service no sound proofing

Pleasant There are many hidden fees. 5 for using credit cards...also staff put me on 2nd floor and I had to pay 150 ringgit to be put on a floor with city view. That was not mentioned during booking and pictures on booking site are not accurate.
Good location, don t opt for the breakfast with your booking Location Breakfast options was not ok. The food types were very local and best suited for Asian. Towels, bathroom mats overused and torn
Good location No comment No comments

Was expecting a better experience from JW Location is excellent to key attractions, restaurants amenities, comfortable, spacious and tastefully decorated room, staff polite and helpful Limited choices of food at breakfast. Lack of healthy choices such as fresh juices, salads and smoothies Service at pool area poor, mostly unattended Choice of TV channels in room rather poor Check In and Out processes and length of time awaiting to be served a poor experience

Excellent location, but the room was a bit underwhelming. The location by Pavillion is definitely a plus. Front desk was very helpful and accommodating. The refrigerator seems like a leftover from the 80s, it's yellowed with age and barely kept my water bottles cold. The fact that such a refrigerator existed in such a hotel with such a good reputation was very discombobulating.
Front desk staff need training Nothing Front desk
I checked in late because the reception asked me to pay cash Nothing
Congestion during breakfast, felt like a fish market which is not accepted for a property of this franchise
Quite run down. TV doesn t work. No phone in the room. Have to use the phone in common area to cAll room services. That s ridiculous for a five stars hotel.

breakfast wasn't included in package was meant to have a king bed but received 2 double beds bathtub was very very very small hot water was just warm having a balcony you can see but not enter was not a smart idea

Check in was supposed to be at 2 3pm, I arrived at 4 and had to wait for 2 hours till 6 because they said that the room was not ready, but it will be ready with in 30 minutes, which was not. He then said that there were other paying elite customers we need to facilitate them as if I wasn t a paying customer to begin with? He then stated that he will send the cards once they re ready to my friends room, in which he also didn t, I had to go down after 2 hours and get it my self. Bed sheets were dirty and smelled horrible. Unacceptable behavior for a hotel of this name.

Too many people. Too many kids, very noisy. Requested for a high floor but got level 9, and had a connecting door next to consistently screaming kids. Tried requesting for a room change but was told room was fully booked, so no initiative there. Was told the day before we could check out at 2pm but then the next day only said 1pm with the same fully booked reason. Had to call the receptionist multiple times to get a request fulfilled. Not worth the money overall there are plenty of other better options at this price point.

The sound proof for the room was bad, aircon was not cool enough, pillow too soft overall the place dont feel too comfortable. Especially there is alot of area still under construction. However the staff are friendly.
Despite of our written request to provide high floor rooms the same was not entertained. The next day 11 PM we were called and asked whether we wanted to move the rooms

For one, the staff other than Jack was rude, not coordinated, didn't bother to listen to you and tried to take the high ground in being right. Don't bother reaching out to the hotel. Via app as they didn't bother to respond. Water from the hot water outlet is yellow with hair in it. Very unhygienic and dirty. I heard other rooms even had mould in it. Pillows very soft and offer no support. I wrote in to the hotel earlier before booking to help collect something for it. While it didn't get delivered due to J T express, the hotel staff didn't bother to help and even claimed no such request was made. Service was absolutely appalling, especially given the brand that this hotel carries. Checked in at 2.30pm, understandably the room was not ready, so the check in officer said that she would call when the room is ready. It s 4pm , and no call was received. My bags are all with the concierge and I m chasing for time to perform Zuhur prayers which I thought I could do at the room . When I went to the counter to ask if the room was ready, they suddenly prepared the keys. When asked why I wasn t contacted if the room was ready, the response was perhaps you gave an inactive number . Seriously? What an elementary excuse. When asked if my bags would be in the room, officer said yes but that was not the case. Bags came maybe 45 minutes after room key was given. Best part is yet to come. Next day, family and I went shopping at Pavilion and when we returned around afternoon, our room cards were deactivated ! Had to leave my poor mother in front of the hotel room while I get it sorted out. When asked why the room keys were deactivated, the response was oh maybe you placed it near to your phone and the card demagnetised . Sounds like an answer curated from ChatGPT. FYI, none of the cards were placed next to the phone. Last day when checking out, I was asked how was my stay. I explained my frustration as above. The officer was apologetic, and to compensate me, they waived my RM 10 flat fee parking ticket. Amazing, RM 10 ?! What a slap across the face. All in all, super disappointed with the service. Save your money and go Hyatt instead if you re looking for a premium experience. But if you re okay with subpar service, it s a good hotel only due to the location.

Our stay at Ascott Star KLCC was truly exceptional from beginning to end. From the moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by the staff, and the level of hospitality throughout our entire stay exceeded our expectations. The room was absolutely stunning beautifully designed, spacious, immaculate, and equipped with everything needed for a comfortable and relaxing stay. Every detail felt thoughtfully prepared, from the elegant furnishings to the high quality amenities. One of the most unforgettable parts of our experience was the incredible panoramic view of the Petronas Towers and the Kuala Lumpur city skyline. Waking up to that breathtaking view each morning and seeing the city lights at night created a truly memorable atmosphere that made our trip even more special. We would especially like to express our sincere appreciation to Lisa, who took wonderful care of us during our stay. She was exceptionally kind, professional, attentive, and genuinely helpful in every interaction. Her warm personality and willingness to assist with anything we needed made us feel valued and completely at home. It is rare to encounter such outstanding customer service, and Lisa truly made a lasting impression on us. In addition, every member of the hotel staff we encountered was courteous, friendly, and highly professional. Whether at reception, housekeeping, or throughout the hotel facilities, the service was consistently excellent. The team clearly takes pride in maintaining high standards and ensuring guests have a seamless and enjoyable experience. The hotel itself is perfectly located, offering both luxury and convenience, and the overall atmosphere was elegant, peaceful, and welcoming. Everything about our stay from the comfort of the room to the exceptional service and spectacular views was beyond impressive. We highly recommend Ascott Star KLCC to anyone visiting Kuala Lumpur and looking for a luxurious and memorable stay.

Think I expected more The room was lovely and having space to chill out was great. The location was really good and you're in the centre of everything. Self checkin did everything in advance including adding all passport details. After travelling just wanted to check in with little fuss and self check in didn t work and therefore had to add all details again. Didn t want to be signed up for rewards programme but person on reception signed me up anyway which was annoying. One reason we chose here was because we had been travelling and the accommodation had a washing machine so could freshen up clothes for the last part of holiday. The washing machine was stinky! Washing up detergent should be supplied even just enough for one load. They specify it needs to be low sud so just provide some. Shouldn t have to buy a huge bag of detergent if just want to do one load of washing. No corkscrew just incase you re planning on getting a bottle wine. Lights inside twin bedroom couldn t be turned off, could do ones in main bedroom but tried all the switches and none turned off the wardrobe ones in the twin which disrupted sleep. Swimming pool on 6th floor had tiles missing and son hurt his toe Swimming pool on top floor had broken wooden boards which felt unsafe , unsteady and wouldn t be able to walk around bare foot. On leaving no one there to check out and felt just poor service. These might all seem like minor things and maybe it s because we ve had exceptional service on our travels throughout Singapore Borneo Malaysia which meant these just took the shine off. All these things collectively just felt not worth it, would have gone somewhere else.

Mediocre. Didn t feel 5 star more like 4. No room service was a pain as we had small kids and always rely on room servic Room was nice quality and clean, great amenities No room service, terrible breakfast

Pleasant The rooftop pool was great and had a good view. The one bedroom suite was nice and the beds were comfy. It was well equipped. In my opinion, this is not a 5 star hotel. I phoned reception and asked them to make me a reservation for their rooftop restaurant. They informed me they couldn t because the restaurant is owned by another company. This is not what i would expect from a 5 star hotel. I would expect to be able to request reception to make me any reservations I ask for right across the city, and this request was for a restaurant in the same building. The pool loungers by the roof top pool did not have cushions and were not comfortable. I also had to go back to reception to get pool towels despite not being previously informed. It has good potential but it is not a 5 star hotel, in my opinion.

Pleasant Location and room comfort. Sofa and beds were comfortable. Gym and pools are great. Air conditioning in both bedrooms did not work. The shower floor was sloped away from the drain so held a major amount of water permanently.
Location sometimes is not enough Location Breakfast

Good location albeit restaurant on the 99th floor needs work on staff and service Location perfect viewing point for Towers The restaurant on the 99nd floor.. you have lots of people around the viewing area whilst eating .. need to determine whether it s a restaurant or viewing area

Breakfast and breakfast hall is cramped and very poor Pool on the top floor is very small but good for the view. Stick to the pool on 6th floor. Good gym facilities, beautiful pool on 6th floor and a good location. One of the Indian security guard at the entrance was very rude or maybe just his culture, but definitely needs some training with how to greet staffs on arrival. Breakfasts hall is very small and cramped for the 2 hotels and when we complained at the reception, they laughed about it. Not many breakfast selection, comparing to other hotel we stopped in Malaysia.

Too many hassles The room was spacious and included a washing machine, which was very convenient. The pool on the 6th floor was large and pleasant, making it a nice place to relax. Check in was inefficient and frustrating, there was a queue, staff were answering their mobile phones during the process, and we were asked to scan a QR code and complete the check in ourselves which we refused . We were initially given a dirty room with multiple maintenance issues. After complaining, we were moved to a cleaner, larger room, but it still had several broken items. Breakfast was poor limited choice, not tasty, and items ran out quickly one day there wasn t even any bread left . Despite there being 3 of us, we were consistently given only 2 towels, and one day there were no pool towels available at all. The rooftop pool was disappointing, with loud music and dining tables blocking the view. The biggest issue, however, was the lifts very long wait times and key cards that often didn t work, making the experience very frustrating.
Spacious Location staff Breakfast sucks

Beautiful hotel, could do more with the bar and restaurant. Fantastic location and an amazing room, however there is little to no ability to get a drink or eat of the evening in the hotel. The bar and restaurant is franchised out. Above the bar and restaurant is franchised and we couldn t even get a plate of chips at the end of the day and had to leave the hotel and find food elsewhere.
It was ok Location Lifts

Overall, the stay was average and not what I had hoped for. I liked the hotel because it is located in the city center. The room was large and spacious, and the apartment had all the necessary facilities, including a kitchen, bedroom, bathrooms, and an extra small room. I was not satisfied with the staff attitude at the reception. There was an issue with my booking, and I had to rebook at the reception with an extra charge of 500 MYR, which was disappointing and affected my stay.

Europeans do not bother The location was good. View of twin towers. Definitely not suitable for Europeans as everything is tailored for asian cultures. Breakfast was very poor, there was only Asian food, eggs and some fruit. Coffee machine was constantly broken and tables were not cleared. No information of hotel facilities. Infinity pool is not actually infinity. 4 sun beds for all hotel. Drinks very overpriced for roof bar and very poor quality cocktails. The room smell of garlic the whole stay, they sent the housekeeper to spray some air fresheners but not helped and no other actions.

Fantastic location, however doesn't live up to its 5 stars. Disappointing! After staying at a fabulous Ascott hotel in Penang, we had high hopes for this hotel in Kuala Lumpur. On arrival, staff were helpful with the check in process and informed us that they'd kindly upgraded our room free of charge. It appears that the hotel has two parts a hotel and also private residence in the form of apartments. We'd been put into one of the apartments which was a great size and included all hotel comforts. The location of the hotel is fantastic. We were informed on check in that the hotel had two pools one of the 6th floor and one on the top floor. The 6th floor pool was under maintenance, however we were advised this would be complete in the next day or two. The top floor pool was available to use, although we were advised that this could get quite busy in the afternoons due to after school clubs. Busy was an understatement! We went up to the top floor pool to explore, and it was FULL of young children and all their parents. It would have been impossible to sit up there. The views from the pool are amazing, so it was such a shame. There were also approx only 4 5 loungers, of which were hard with no cushions and therefore very uncomfortable. My husband went to ask reception about the 6th floor pool and when this may be available to use due to the crazyness of the top floor pool. Staff were unable to advise a time frame. We wouldn't have booked to stay in the hotel if we knew we wouldn't be able to relax around a pool after a day of seeing the sights. The staff gave the option of providing a refund for the night we stayed and us trying to find alternative accommodation, however as we were only staying for three nights, we didn't want to have to move elsewhere. The hotel breakfast room was beyond disappointing. Considering the size of the hotel, the room was tiny and felt so cramped. The food options were also poor, and we ended up grabbing a coffee from the next door coffee shop. This was our last stop of our honeymoon after touring Malaysia for three weeks, so although we didn't let it ruin our time, it was a slight disappointment. It definitely doesn't live up to its 5 stars unfortunately.

Passable Location Cleanliness, room was not clean from day one. Room was not swept. Washing machine dryer feature was not working. Our bathroom sink was not draining fast enough so it would clog up easily. Hot water was extremely hot for a few seconds then would get cold and stay cold
Average Rooms were not cleaned properly Housekeeping very poor

Passable It was very close city centre and room was clean. Breakfast was very disappointing. It felt more like a 2 3 star hotel experience. The options were extremely limited, with mostly eggs available. I don t believe this level of breakfast matches a 5 star hotel.
Pleasant AC was not working in our master bedroom and I have informed them in the first day but the problem was not solved, last day they had to change our room

Not a 5 star hotel, fake photos of the pool Staff is friendly Nice bakery at the entrance Hafizah Mahmod Guest Service Manager always comments he will look into it and improve but obviously nothing has improved. A guest in march complained that there are no towels at the pools and there are still none. So its just empty words and I don't want to go back ever. Worst breakfast I have seen in my life and I walked out

Not a 5 star hotel, fake photos Staff friendliness, helpfulness, polite and professional 9 10 Size of the suite Pool on the 6th floor is quite nice I booked this hotel because of the rooftop pool which, to my disappointment, does not look at all like in the photos of booking com. So don't think this are real photos you are seeing, they are fake. I did not even go to swim there once. It is very ugly in reality, very small and cheap looking men fully dressed sitting right next to it in groups smoking cigarettes. Not an environment a woman wants to be in a bikini or swim. Fist time in hundreds of 5 star hotels I was told to drink filtered tap water as they don't provide drinking water for environmental reasons . For environmental reasons I did move to the Mandarin Oriental after 3 days and never go back there. There is no service at all, the nicer pool at the 6th floor does not even provide towels, there is nobody there to take care of anything. Why is there no hostess to bring a bottle of water, towels, ice bucket ? It all looks half abandoned and neglected. The facilities itself are not bad but there is no management, no care and no service at all. Then they sent me the most cringe email a day before departure Within the next 48 hours, you will receive an email from Booking com inviting you to share your feedback. On the 1 10 rating scale, a score of 9 or 10 is considered excellent. I mean you are begging or threatening to get a 9 or 10 star rating ? And for what ? The horrible breakfast where nothing is edible the great staff at least refunded the costs as I explained to them I can not eat such low quality food And with that I give a generous 5 rating which is only for the kind staff and the okey facilities like washing machine and room size.

Really average. Marketed as a 5 star location but it doesn't feel like it at all. The room was spacious and clean and only a short walk to Petronas Towers and the area around. 12 00PM checkout was helpful. Air conditioning worked well. Breakfast was really average given the supposed 5 star nature of this place, I have had way better elsewhere. Location is good for twin towers district but for anything else it's a 20 minute walk minimum. Building feels really cheaply made, constructed as someone's investment rather than trying to service customers well.

Not great at all. This hotel wasn t amazing. You are better getting a different hotel for your money. Trust me. There are basic fundamentals of a hotel and this hotel could not provide. It s not worth the money. The breakfast is the same breakfast every single day. Again what you pay for you would find something else which would be way better. I definitely won t be booking this hotel again and this is the first time I ve ever wrote a negative comment for a hotel.
Passable Nice location Cheap furniture.

Passable No clear indiaction of No room service available. Breafast area is small and Not much choices, mostly ran out of simple thing like bread. Only 2 helping staff in the brekfast area. 4 sun beds only on the roof swimming pool area and no clear instuctions on colletion of towels from the ground floor. Resturant on the roof they says is part of the hotel but never waa told you have to book 1 day in advance.

Passable Beds comfy Washing detergent provided was nice Bag people are very friendly The check in is just a faff, signing up to websites and for loyalty etc, what happened to just giving over passports and being good to go. The sofa in the room was covered in stains The staff just didn't seem like they wanted to help, I told them we had no soap in our shower dispenser and they replied what do you want us to do .. maybe a language barrier, but we stayed in a few hotels in KL and this was the worst by far for communication. The pool wasn't cleaned throughout the day, we went in the morning and someone had littered in there, It was still the same when we went in the evening. No extra towels provided for the pool, so you need to use the same towels for the pool and after a shower we had to dry ourselves with wet towels. The restaurant is so close to the pool it just feels a bit weird trying to relax next to people eating dinner.
Pleasant Location Spacious room Kitchenette Parking is basically a maze! No smart tv so no netflix or amazon prime possibility

Would expect more for the room rate! Clean comfortable room! Well located to visit KLCC. Staff told us about breakfast at check in as if we had it included in our booking when we didn t, use of facilities wasn t clear and it really didn t live up to the luxury is claimed.
Not worth the money Cleaning was not very thorough, I ve found fake eyelashes from the previous person left on the towel and sticky tape for make up on the table

Very poor service but nice rooms The rooms themselves were great and spacious. We stayed in a one bedroom and it was nice to have a separate living room, kitchen and washing machine. Good gym with modern equipment. Very disorganised, very weak communication and efficiency from staff across the board. For the price you pay at this hotel, one expects a lot more support from staff, including proving basic information on how the overall property works and what to expect. After 3 weeks across Asia, this was the worst hotel we stayed in. For the same price and cheaper there are much better hotels in KL with better service. The pool area is shared with residents and others, which means it s always busy, noisy and lacking in amenities. The rooftop pool is also very busy with people from the restaurant taking photos in every corner. It s not comfortable to enjoy time at that pool.

Could do with cleaner air and more vacuuming. Room size was good. Kitchen was complete. And they provided your own wash machine. It was stuffy when we came in. Aircon at the master bedroom was not really working, took hours to cool the room. Switches were also confusing, some of them get switched on when you hit up, some when you hit down. And though it looked clean, it was dusty. Since we started having sinus and itchy throats.

This hotel feels tired Location, view, pet friendly Staff not helping much, very confusing parking, got side eye from Muslim women while check in with my dog this is pet friendly hotel , the room smells like old and dirty carpet

Peak season chaos The comfort of a service apartment type hotel and the location is spot on in the city. Check in was so slow. I understand it is currently holiday season but the staff that assisted check in was most likely a newbie so the whole procedure took twice as long as i previously experienced and it was almost 4pm and i was told my room was not ready even though it was written 3pm check in time. And no compensation whatsoever was provided. I was tired from driving for 4 hours straight and just wanted to rest. In the end gave me another room in another floor which also inconveniences me as i have booked 2 rooms for my party of 4 and we were unable to meet at each other's rooms freely as one needs a key card to get to that floor. Luckily it was just for a short stay but if i were staying longer, this arrangement is greatly unacceptable. Another thing to note but is unfortunately not controllable is the parking. The sharp angles are not big car friendly, so it makes getting in and out of the premise by cars a hassle. But i understand the space restraint in the city.

Pleasant La piscine avec une vu impeccable The staff weren't welcoming att all. A big flop for the breakfast. We have stayed there for 7 days and there was no moring we went and find something to eat. Always everything was almost finished and they didn't even try to replanish the plates . Not forgetting that it dosen't contain a real meal to start the day with as it must to be since it is considred a 5 stars hotel.

The facilities were excellent, but the overall experience was overshadowed by poor service. Location, pool areas, views, room Customer service was poor. Receptionist demanded us to write good reviews in TripAdvisor and promised to send my postcard after receiving reviews but the postcard never came so I assume she never sent it. In addition, in order to get earlier check in, I was required to join Ascott s customer program. All in all, to get extra services like described above, they wanted to take advantage of us which felt very unfriendly. For hotel like this I had higher expectations for service. In addition, the breakfast could have had a wider selection. Some products even ran out and weren t replaced.

No value for money Location The bathroom in the room was very small. If you turned on the water in the kitchen or something like that, the water pressure would drop. The water was either very low or at a low temperature. The 6th floor has the pool, but there are no bars or anything available to spend the day and enjoy it. Just the pool. On the 99th floor, which is like the terrace, there's a restaurant, it's not bad. But they also have a pool there that has no shade, and you can't bring drinks in. The breakfast is served in a closed area with no windows or anything. It wasn't included in our room, which I found really disappointing, especially considering it's supposed to be a 5 star hotel. Also, the breakfast was quite incomplete and the service was poor. They didn t clean the tables between guests. The elevator works if you're lucky. Definitely far from a 5 star experience. Not worth the money.

Probably the last time I will stay at Ascott. Cleanliness One of the male staff at the check in counter is not suitable to be in service industry. He lacked interest in his job and did not bother to offer any help when I said I could not get any network for submitting my information online at check in. Gave wrong information to us too. The Indian lady who attended to my friends had much better attitude and was very professional.

Disappointing Experience! The location is prime. The Gym had variety of equipment and the pool on the top has breathtaking views. It was nice to have a washing machine in our room. The worst breakfast ever! The room does not appear to have appropriate acoustics for breakfast, the music was too loud. The way some items were served such as butter is just straight up disgusting and unsanitary. Grabbing the cold butter with a pincher which was impossible to put on our plates. The food choices are so limited it's unbelievable for a hotel with such a rating. onely ONE type of tea and ONE type of coffee. Breakfast was really like a canteen in a cheap manufacturing plant. Even the cutlery we had to collect by ourselves. The staff had to be asked to refill despite them hovering around in the room. It was so unappealing we preferred to go next door to Miss J for some appetising snacks. Definitely alot of room for improvement.

Passable Close to pavilion and KLCC There was no windows in the second bedroom, so no sunlight. Don t take breakfast cause it s subcontracted by another company and not in hotel, breakfast was not good no choice and was waste of money

Stunning location and potentially top class but overrated accomodation Location very close to Petronas Towers Suria KLCC. Rooftop pool on the 99th floor and a big pool on the 6th both open until 2200hrs. Excellent gym facilities. Pampas cafe on the 6th serves good food and prices are reasonable. The appartments are large. Check in was chaotic and took way too long. According to front desk employee we would have made 2 bookings, while this was definitely not the case. I requested KLCC view or an upgrade to next category and despite having contact and availability the hotel in advance my ASR Gold status wasn't recognized at all which to me was very disappointing. Upon check in nformation about hotel facilities was poor. There was no bottled water in the room which is very unusual. We didn't have warm water twice and engeneering needed to come to our room to solve issue. Returning from the pool we couldn't enter our room as the battery from the doorlock didn't work anymore and engineering needed to replace battery, it took us 25 mins waiting in wet clothes. Breakfast is at a reasonable price however choices are really limited. We have read this in many reviews but seems not to be priority for hotel management to improve. Overall we have choosen this accomodation amongst others due to the high ranking at booking.com but we think this hotel is somehow overrated and there is room for improvement.
It was wonderful. Rooms were very clean It was shocking that the breakfast area for 5 stars hotel, it was like a worker canteen.
Passable The washing machine is not clean. Very dirty It's hard to imagine ,if putting clothes in the wash will only make them dirtier.
Pleasant the carpark sistem is messy
Overall okay Good clean property with convenient location Shower pressure was extremely low and wasn t fixed despite raising concern. Breakfast room staff is very rude

Average Location of the hotel is very convenient. Overall cleanliness, spaciousness of rooms is good. Nothing else to add other than this. Food options at breakfast are pathetic. Especially for vegetarian guests there are hardly any options available. The staff at Breakfast Room was extremely rude. We had booked 4 Rooms for 6 Adults and 4 Children. One of the children is 5 years old. Still the staff at Breakfast asked us to pay for 2 pax. When we pushed back on it and protested, the reception waived off the unwarranted breakfast charge. Another issue was Water Pressure in Bathroom shower. It was absolutely not up to the mark and should have been 3 times more than what it was. Despite complaining about it, nothing was done to address this issue by Hotel.
pleasant stay in nice hotel nice location, great view of the towers , great facilities pushing of membership program, bad check in experience

Pleasant The location of the Hotel is superb, it is a walking distance 3 min from the Twin tower. Very clean and the studio has almost everything needed for a person to stay more than a week, there is a small kitchen, washing machine, dishes, clean and drinkable water. i asked for a twin tower view from the room, and i didn't get this! instead i got the room that has the tiniest window in the hotel. for the breakfast it has a very limited options, even we didn't knew till last day that they can provide Omelette. they don't have rooms with 1 double bed, they provide for us very small twin bed next to each other.
Definitely not a 5 star Nothing much to like Extremely freezing lobby and breakfast was poor even a 3 star hotel has more options

Not worth the money. Not given what we booked and paid for. It was very clean and a great location. We booked our stay 3 months in advance we lashed out for our last night after a month of backpacking and we re so keen for a big comfy hotel bed . Upon arrival, the receptionist told us that the room we booked had been sold out, so instead of having an extra large double bed that we booked 3 months ago, we were told that now we have 2 single beds side by side. She said they give the big beds to people who stay longer than a month. Beds we stayed in in hostels were bigger and better! And we paid all this money to sleep in a single bed each. She wasn t very apologetic and didn t offer and type of discount or voucher, we re just told there s nothing they can do and to deal with it. So just be aware that what you book may not be what you get when you actually rock up. I wouldn t stay here again, not worth the money. Also, the phones in the room didn t work.

Overall good but not the best breakfast Close to KLCC Quite area Helpful and lovely staff Very basic inter continental breakfast and the coffee is really bad. There was a bad smell coming from the toilet sink that affected the smell for the flat.
Pleasant A huge room with a bath and shower. Breakfast was horrible like in max 2 hotel .
Pleasant Lovely modern and clean hotel in an excellent location only let down by the miserable staff working there.
Pleasant the restaurant was not ready at that time but charged as a normal breakfast pricing for box packing food

4 star building, 1 star welcome La posizione, l'hotel nuovo, la vista, la camera attrezzata con utensili e lavatrice. We haven't been notified before booking about two negative things first of all the noise from 10 am to 5 pm because of renovation works at the 20th floor we were really close and the sound was disturbing, considering the fact that we wanted to rest because of the jet lag . We asked to move but nobody at the reception considered our request. Also, we booked breakfast included thinking about a 4 star hotel buffet. Instead they bring you to the room a poor set of breakfast in a box, also ringing at your door without respecting the time of delivery you asked for! I'm writing this review in english because Booking assistance told me the hotel agreed to refund me but they are ignoring my messages. I hope they will read this, because booking their hotel without these two important warnings renovation noise and no breakfast buffet was misleading for a level 3 genius client! Unfortunately I don't recommend this hotel because even if the rooms are new and everything is clean and elegant, we weren't welcomed and couldn't relax as we hoped.
Pleasant Building from outside and modern design There is no breakfast restaurant. They give you a breakfast in box.

Passable I was not informed earlier that the restaurant for breakfast was closed for renovation. It was really disappointing to get a box everyday in the morning. And on one day they didnt send that small box as well.

Great room and location but breakfast was shocking and check in with just one staff member meant we were waiting ages. W Great location nice room with a great view Breakfast was incredibly embarrassing. Served in a small box delivered to your room with biscuits drink fruit like a small packed lunch. We gave up on breakfast and went out to eat in the mall.

It was a average kind of stay. The location and amenities are good. Nice place for families. The rooms are too spacious with a good ambiance. The pools are great. One of the toilets was smelling like hell. we complain to reception many times, though they did send a plumber but the smell still remained. service was poor. staff needs to be more welcoming.

The rooftop deck is in lack of maintenance, the wood is in most areas really damaged, pointy and sharp, we were by the pool and my husband got hurt by the wood deck and was bleeding a lot, we asked for help at the restaurant right next to the pool and they only offered a napkin and told us to reach hotel employees because they are not related, my husband could not walk because he was bleeding too much, a napkin did not help at all, there's no way to reach front desk or someone from the 'hotel' from the rooftop so I had to go to the building entrance to find help mind we had our kids with us, so I had to carry my baby all the way down wet because we were swimming, there are not clean towels by the pool , I went twice, first time I was told help was already at the rooftop so I went all the way to the rooftop to find no one up there, went down again very angry this time because it was no emergency but is not possible the rooftop deck is in such condition and is unacceptable no one is interested in helping, I asked again for help at the front desk, and same lady said she was calling but nobody picked up, mind there were 4 people in front desk, no one tried to help, they just dialed some numbers and said no one picks up, that's it... I asked at least for a towel to clean the bleeding and went back to the rooftop to find there was people with an first aid kit, my husband did all the cleaning and bandage himself... It took around 20 min for help to come, and I had to come up and down to find help... While going back to our rooms 2 guest who were checking in as I asked for help approached us and said they were sorry for the situation but that the front desk employees didn't care at all, they said in fact they were laughing of me as I walked away ...

I was disappointed that I paid for breakfast but could only use it once during my stay. Breakfast was served from 7 00 a.m. to 10 00 a.m., while we typically woke up between 11 00 a.m. and 12 00 p.m. When I requested a partial refund for the unused breakfasts, the hotel declined. This was frustrating and felt like poor customer service.
You can get the same for 30 euros in KL. Too expensive. The view was bad on the 7th floor even if the price was the same than in any other floor.
Poor upkeep, poor breakfast quality. Business office area per hour rate is more expensive than a 1 night stay in their 2 bedroom apartment which does not make any sense.

The hotel offers lots of facilities, but all are poorly maintained and frustrating to use. The washing machine was badly calibrated and often got stuck mid cycle. It would make a loud grinding noise at random settings so I needed to reset it constantly. I ended up spending my final night awake just trying to finish washing and drying my clothes. The TV screen mirroring froze at one point, making it impossible to change settings, adjust the volume, or turn off the TV. The air conditioning made the room either freezing cold, or if you turned it off, unbearably hot. It did not respond to any temperature adjustments. Even the elevators was frustrating. Depending on your starting point, you needed to use different lifts. You can only found out if the elevator will go to your floor once you were already inside, which meant I had to return to the ground floor several times and start over. The rooftop pool has a fantastic view, but it was full of tourists coming only to take photos in one specific corner, while people from the bar would sit and stare at guests as if they were part of the entertainment. The shower pressure was honestly the worst I have experienced in a five star hotel. It was barely more than a trickle, completely dependent on gravity so no water pressure AT ALL. Basic amenities such as shower gel and shampoo were empty upon arrival. I only found out once I had gotten under the shower, so had to wait for the replacements for 20 minutes while being completely wet. Hygiene was probably the most disappointing part. There was a clipped fingernail left right on the coffee table, and behind the door handle, tape from the previous guest had not even been removed. What made this worse was the hotel s response. After reporting the fingernail and the empty amenities, there was no apology at all. Instead, I was only asked when I had checked in and whether the fingernail could have been mine...
Don t have restaurant, in room dining only 3 party place for breakfast

We booked two nights and then moved to nearby Shangri La hotel later referred as SL so I can compare. Room was not clean, plastic bag under sofa remained there even after the cleaning, dust in the corridors there the entire stay. SL not an issue. Pools are nice but no available sunbeds. SL not an issue. Breakfast is a bad joke, no ham, no cheese, very limited number of sweets, queues for everything, scrambled eggs not salted and the salt does not work. SL maybe 10x more options, no queues, fabulous food. Staff omg, the behaviour of these people is not what you would expect, go to SL to see how it should be. Elevators waiting time is unacceptable, sometimes it's minutes, very frustrating. SL 10 seconds maximum.
Horrible breakfast. The worst I have ever had. No housekeeping unless we reminded them. On one of the days, there was no housekeeping even after I called and reminded them.

Apart from the location and the apartment nothing is good about this property. The room service was very slow, the housekeeping guy threw the used shower cap but didn t replace it. My intention was to reuse it thats why it was kept hanging. He made the bed but didn t clean or vacuumed the floor. I could find hair strands after the housekeeping guy left. The water heater was terrible, not strong enough to fill the bathtub. My husband was very pissed at me that why i booked this property. Where by adding just few bucks we were getting Ritz Carlton which is in same locality. Adding to our disappointment was the complimentary breakfast, they are so particular to shut the service at 10am that they wont refill anything after 9 30am. There was such a long queue around 8 15am, the seating area was almost filled. If you wait for the seat, the food would get over. Very less options, average taste and quality. Would definitely suggest others to book without breakfast and get something nice from 7 eleven and reheat or cook at your room. Lastly, what pissed me at the last day was that after check out suddenly i was feeling very thirsty and dizzy. It was very hot in KL last week. I asked for some water from the reception and guy was like sorry we don t provide any water here, its only available in the rooms and that too from the tap and if you want you can try costa coffee but thats chargeable The apathetic response was enough to prove that my husband was right we have wasted our money.

The housekeeper was extremely unprofessional. In the main suite bathroom, there was still a cotton swab left by the previous guest on the vanity. In the guest bathroom, the used soap bar from the prior guest had not been replaced with a new one. I went to the front desk to address this, and a male manager not the nice lady who helped us earlier assisted me. He apologized very sincerely and promised to fix everything right away. However, when we returned after dinner, the soap still hadn t been replaced. To make matters worse, there was no hot water in the guest bathroom when I tried to take a shower at night.
Breakfast was terrible. No cutlery, dirty dishes, staff took ages before clean up and refill. Room was cleaned only later in the afternoon. Drinks at the rooftop bar of poor quality.
The rooms were not clean
No variety in breakfast Poor quality breakfast

The breakfast was so limited. There were no basic needs for breakfast like cheese or butter, even the coffee machine was out of order. The elevators are too slow to extend of waiting 10 min each time we want to use it. Only three elevators for this crowded hotel. The staff response was so slow to any request, such as cleaning the room or providing any complimentary things like team bags or sugar to the room.
The staff weren t friendly and i think they wanted to be tipped to provide the help they should provide

We had an ant colony in the room, told them about it and they offered to spray the room which did nothing and still had the ant colony for the next 5 days. Even at checkout we told them again and all they said is we will let management know. And sometimes they do fill your coffee pods and sometimes they don t, and when you ask for some, expect an hour wait
Never again ..

Overall the service and experience was not 5 star. The room was dirty and surfaces hadn t been wiped, you could see liquid marks from previous occupants on the tables. The rugs hadn t been hoovered. We didn t realise that you needed to switch the water heater on for hot water, we couldn t shower until this heated up. You d expect instant hot water in a 3 star hotel.. The swimming pool is just for show, there s 6 very impractical sun beds up there for the whole hotel, you have to go down 60 floors to get a towel from reception and there s zero space up there if you want to hang around which we didn t because the restaurant want to use every spot for tables for their customers and not hotel guests.

Unfortunately, a very bad stay. The room was fine, but it was hardly cleaned, and everything was only superficially clean. The pool is nice, but the loungers are broken, and there are very few available spots. The gym has neither towels nor water. There is no breakfast and nothing to buy in terms of food or drinks. We also had no water in the room or a minibar, and the staff often speaks poor English.

The Hotel franchises out the breakfast room and roof top bar. The night we arrived Roof top bar closed for a private function. There was nobody to help us with our luggage. One night no hot water. The worst breakfast in any hotel I have ever stayed in. The management utterly useless.

Ants and dirt! One day we have found an army of ants in our room! They were running here and there. After calling room service, a worker came to our room and sprayed ant repellent with a pretty strong smell. It was absolutely impossible to continue living in that room with ants and such a strong and harmful smell. Only after an hour, did we receive another room. But because of ants, I was forced to throw my bag away, as it was impossible to remove all the ants from there. Moreover while we were checking the room for another ant except that we had found on the table we saw so much dirt in our room that we had an impression that the cleaning didn t work there. Another negative point that I would like to add is breakfast. Because of the renovation of the breakfast area, we were forced to eat an la carte menu but not a continental breakfast. It was awful, and we didn't eat it after only one try. There was no choice, the taste was awful. Only a view at 99 level was good. I would like to say that this hotel doesn t deserve to be a 5 star hotel. I don t recommend staying here.
WORST BREAKFAST EVER, it was a joke and almost disrespectful. We asked twice to speak to the manager abou that, who of course never turned up.

Even though I travel a lot, I generally don't write reviews, but I need to let you know how disappointed I was with this hotel and why I highly don't recommend anyone staying there. Although the rooms are good, the service and the main facility, which is the swimming pool with a view, are terrible. I stayed for 3 days and every afternoon evening I tried to go to the pool to see the view and it was simply impossible to stay in the area. There is an extremely busy restaurant in the rooftop and the people on the waiting list for this restaurant occupy entirely the pool area. And when I say occupy, it's not taking a photo with the tower, it's SITTING on all the sun loungers and using the entire pool space just see the screenshots from the video that I made . In addition to being extremely uncomfortable and not private, I was unable to use the pool simply because there was no place I could put my belongings all these days. To make matters worse, I informed reception more than once and they said that there should be a security guard on the floor to prevent this from happening, but they did nothing on any of the days, not even giving me any support or apology. There were other problems with the hotel service that I won't go on and on about, but I had to ask for TOWELS and they only gave them to me the third time I called, the remote control had no batteries and they only arrived in my room 1 hour after I called the front desk... anyway, it's certainly not a 4 star service. If you're just looking for the room, maybe this hotel is for you, but if you want a minimally efficient front desk and use the hotel's facilities which was supposed to be the big difference due to the view , look for another place.

We also had lunch there which was delicious and great value. I would recommend upgrading to Club if you can, lots of perks but the best one was free drinks and food between 5 7pm every evening cocktails, wine, beer, soft drinks, coffee. Great to have a drink and chill before going out for dinner. The sky bar and pool were good too. I d stay there again.

The view from our room was spectacular. The room was a nice size n clean . The staff was very helpful. We had a nice birthday dinner at Bara on Six.

We left it and went to the bar and restaurant on the 6th floor. We were so disappointed we did not stay.
