Traders Hotel Kuala Lumpur shines for its location,the service fell short of expectations. I chose Traders Hotel Kuala Lumpur for its unbeatable location, and it did not disappoint. Being right next to KLCC Park and just a short walk from Suria KLCC and the Petronas Towers made exploring the city extremely convenient. I booked a KLCC Tower View room, hoping for a breathtaking view of the iconic Petronas Towers. While the view was decent, it was slightly underwhelming. The bed was positioned facing away from the towers, which took away from the experience. A layout that maximizes the view from the bed would greatly enhance the stay. However, the service left much to be desired. The staff, particularly at the concierge, were not friendly and helpful. They didn't even ask if we needed assistance with our luggage upon arrival, which was disappointing. Surprisingly, it was the security staff who stepped in to guide us to our room kudos to them for their attentiveness. On the other hand, the front desk staff did not disappoint. Though i can't recall his name, one gentleman was especially polite and helpful, making the check in process smooth and pleasant.

For a quality brand, poor service and standards. Location, we stayed before a few years ago. Quality of rooms, general service standards of staff poor, too expensive for our stay this time! Needs upgrade. Concierge service very poor

Asked me a question about whether i m driving which I couldn't hear the first time, and she was unhappy to repeat the question. Purposely slowed down her talking as if I don t understand English. I don t see the need to be arrogant. But other staffs were nice and friendly.

Hardware needs updating Connected to the conference centre and thus very convenient The first room I got on the 15th floor is extremely dated, with worn squishy carpet, worn black leather chair with the grey fibre under the leather showing, fabric couch with lots of stains on it, socket under the bedside table which can only be got to if you lie down on the worn carpet and was broken so the plug would keep falling out, a telephone that didn t work so cannot call concierge reception and a TV stand that looked like a biggish computer monitor that took up half of the desk space, and I also had hair and a dead insect on the bed under the duvet. They changed my room to one on a different floor which was more recently which has a newer leather chair and a reasonably clean couch, new sockets on the bedside table and wooden floor, but the door lock didn t work it was not aligned with the door frame which they fixed over 2 days. The staff were apologetic but it would had been better if the hardware was not at all up to standard. When I left I requested emailed receipt instead of a hard copy and they forgot to send, on reminding them they sent a blank letter. I had to request for them to send again.

The hotel's location is very convenient, and the KLCC view from our room was absolutely stunning. We experienced a significant delay in our check in process. Despite arriving at 1 pm, we had to wait in the lounge until 4 30 pm before getting our room. Additionally, I had requested simple birthday decorations, but we only received two cupcakes after a reminder. This did not meet our expectations. We have stayed at other Shangri La hotels and found their service to be excellent. Unfortunately, this stay did not meet the same standard.
Fair Room, it is quite dusty especially under the bed
moderate location near KLCC Room a bit rundown, with no hair dryer and poor television channel. Our room don t have nice view of KLCC.. a bit dissappointed.

Lovely hotel shame about the staff The property was great and the view of the towers from the tower room is amazing The staff made us feel like we didn t belong in the club room even though we had booked the remove because of the lounge.

Fabulous. The view from the room. Friendly helpful staff. Great can do to any request for assistance. Breakfast choice was fantastic. Do try the buffet at Goto at least once. Room with adjoining door. Noise from adjoining room was insufferable.

They need to improve their services The room is clean and big The security staff tall one standing in the hotel is so nice and helpful There is no apple pay and the machine doesn't support international card I call for luggage service to pick up my luggage and it takes one hour for them to pick up luggage from my room . The check in is not in the main entrance you need to go to first floor

Passable Location and view was great I check in late around 10.30 pm. Jet lag from states and found out the tv was not working. I call in receptionist if I can change the room and said no tv due to rain. I stay the entire stay and tv was not working. Usually it doesn t bother me but jet lag help me to watch tv.
Location and services amazing , but meet to change the furniture They need to change the furniture
It was just okay Clean Old hotel with outdated interiors. Even the lobby is boring and not welcoming

Pleasant The view is amazing if you pay for a twin towers view, or go to the roof top bar or traders club lounge. The room was pretty basic. The shower cubicle is too small as it connects to the bath tub. There is a weird mirror on the side of a cabinet. The light fittings weren't done properly, and they have just recently done room refits. The room wasn't ready until nearly 2 hours late they offered us an 'upgrade' to a disgusting smelling smoking suite, which we rejected. The food wasn't great to be honest. Disappointing overall, especially as a repeat visitor.

Location wise, the hotel is great. Other than that, if you re planning to spend RM500 on a hotel room, I d rather much Location is great if you're planning to spend most of your time going to KLCC next door. For the price you re paying for the room, you don t really get that much. The room is small and weirdly enough the window is only half the size of the wall. The TV is from like the early 2010s albeit with plenty of channels to choose from , not much storage space and the room gets pretty dark from the lack of lighting.

Disappointed with the hotel deteriorated over the years but never do any upgrading. Breakfast so so, no surprise. Hotel location is the best for me. Upgrade the room furniture please . All deteriorated and sofa got insect bite me.

Pleasant Great location, staff were all friendly. Free buggy service from hotel to klcc shopping centre which was a great bonus. The room I got had the klcc view. Assuming the room would have been used frequently, The housekeeping of the room itself was done poorly. Lots of dust on surfaces, including the chair by the main work desk, was filled with dust. Ventilation of room was also poor. You could smell smoke on and off. I was in a non smoking room .

Moderate Clean room, international power sockets at least worked for EU type No early check in and awful service. We arrived at 13 40 but the room was not provided. And I believe the hotel wasn't full at all. We were provided a piece of paper to exchange it on the key later. In several hours we returned and were forced to wait a long queue to receive the key. We asked several times but the personnel asked to wait. Poor service at checkout. My spouse asked for a glass of water at the checkout but received the answer that it will be available only after 1PM. In addition, no minibar, hair dryer is in the room but not in the bathroom, no roof pool. Previously I had a short stay at Ibis nearby and I can say it was at least not worse if not better but the price was twice lower.
Passable Location Facilities looks old

Dissapointed. Not like the Traders we used to know. Standard was compromised The location and the Bara restaurant was awesome. The customer service. The staff are friendly. Given the choice of Traders Club and Restaurant at level 5 is a breather. The room we were staying, the dusty sofa and carpet was not well maintained. The mouldy bathroom. The breakfast level 5 was not like the Pre Covid. Kind of dissapointed. The nasi lemak sambal was a little too sour. Some food not replenish.
Wont come back again ! Location Maintenance of the room s bath area was very very poor it kept flooding everything you shower

Overall is great stay The location is strategic to the city center. Buggy service is plus point from hotel to KLCC. Room condition is good and the guard is very helpful. Need more facilities for kids as we travel with kids. The receptionist area could open up some counters for check in customers.

Good location but I got rashes from staying here Close to klcc I can't really pinpoint what it was but I got rashes when I stayed at Traders hotel, and it got worse the second night. When I moved to another hotel I didn't have the same issue. Also the carpet in the room smells stuffy and filled with dust it didn't feel like it was clean enough.

KL New Year Location is great. KLCC park is on the doorstep. It is a much quieter area than Bukit Bintang. The mall is very close and walkable but there is a shuttle too. Bukit Bintang is walkable to food street too and some of the sights like KL Tower. Large and comfy bed. Staff were very helpful. The hotel rooms are dated and therefore not very luxury. There are much nicer hotels to stay in for the price. You are paying for the location. Sky Bar has amazing views but this is also where the hotel pool so it isn't very private and can also have non hotel guests in.
Pleasant Booked this hotel specifically for the 1 night we were staying in KL to have the best views of the Twin Towers.. did not disappoint!! Hotel feels a bit outdated old

The Twin Tower view is magnificent. Other than that is just a fair Good . Spread is sumptuous The check in took a long time, more than 30mins . Requested extra bed but wasn t prepared, the sofa bed was horrible, the cushion had sunk in already , caused back pain after sleeping on it . The hotel should have play area for kids.

Passable location Check in process must improve, i understand staff is doing their best but must find a way to reduce the congestion during check in. Luckily we got our rooms at 3pm but my family who booked another room only managed to check in nearly 5pm
Old hotel, better choose new ones The breakfast was really great, many varieties. Quite crowded in the morning time Facilities are old

Just because you are next to kl convention Location only Inefficient checkin is extremely slow Parking is limited and the valet staff relatively arrogant rude The food room service is extremely poor too
Passable Online payment for my breakfast but in the end hotel

Location is good but check in process is terrible The location and buggy service to KLCC is very convenient I checked into the hotel expecting a smooth experience, but it fell short. The check in counter on level 1 was cramped, and despite arriving at 3 pm, my room wasn't ready until 7 pm. Though they called to update me, the inconvenience was notable. The room, unfortunately, didn't match the advertised the bathroom even had stray hairs. Moreover, landing a lower floor translated to a disappointing view. Overall, the stay didn't live up to expectations.

Facing tons of issues in the stay Location is convenient, room is clean and acceptably spacious . Staffs are very friendly Need Netflix on the TV lol , more parking space needed for the second barrier area , elevator arrival is very slow compared to past year of the same month Facing tons of issues during the stay First night faced water leak through the windows. Got moved to another room where the aircond is very very warm. Got a Techician to take a look, he made some adjustments and asked me to give the aircond 10 minutes. Issue persists, however somewhere during midnight the aircond eventually starts to be cooling. Went out the next day and came back to the room only to notice the aircond is back to being warm again. Asked a second technician to take a look and only this time issues does not come back again. The following day, access card cannot be used at two different elevators. Security assisted me at third elevator which somehow works. However card can t be used to open room door. Forced to waste 30 mins to queue at first floor for assistance. The next day, entered parking area pass second barrier. No space available. Turned back into the area at the first barrier. When heading out , I Informed counter that I changed from second barrier to first barrier while obtaining parking Chop. Autopay machine shows error validating my parking ticket. Forced to move up again to first floor, only to have them ask me to refer the counter at G floor. G floor staff asked me to refer first floor staff. I asked G for staff to settle the issue on the spot as I don t enjoy having my problems being pushed around. OVERALL AN UNPLEASANT EXPERIENCE FOR A NOT SO CHEAP HOTEL ROOM

Pleasant Please upgrade your receiption bcoz i have to Q almost 45minute to check in. I am almost give up. Other counter Q is fast but my counter is very slow. Hope u all upgrade your system in order for your client to check in fast.
For the price, I think there is better options Location Small Check In area, poor communication from the Check In staff, Carpet smell in the room that we stayed in

It was good to stay as all the staff are very polite and friendly. When we checked in the Toilet was in a horrible condition and I had to shout at one of the staff members to clean and eventually they did clean it to my satisfaction. I even told them that This is not a five star property Over the five nights stay it was good.

Passable Location and twin towers view are unmatched. The hotel has so much potential yet it appears it's managed poorly. Significant delays at check in with rooms not being ready for 2 hours after the designated check in time.

Pleasant Location Booking system terrible..You can elled my rooms. Due to a stuff up with Cc.Then when I rebooked exact same the price increased 30 more... 2. No explanation or answer to my complaint..the third party booking thru shangrila was hopeless

amazing property! we loved the gym health center and also the view from the sky bar was amazing!!! hotel staff were not quite upto expectation, they are very impatient and gets frustrated easily. didnt feel empathetic towards to the circumstance.

Overall, my stay was very pleasant. It met my expectation. Location and room i stayed in a twin tower view room view was amazing. The hotel is located in a very convenient location which made our stay very smooth The hotel seemed very old in design and facilities . And it is in need of major renovations. For example, phone charging facilities are not available on both side of bed, which was very inconvenient

Location is great, communication is not as great. Location is prefect. The condition of the room was out dated, there was evidence of room needing repairs. Was unable to the run the bath. Room lights in the celling had dust. I didn t like the fact upon check I had to take my suitcase to my room. Hotel was charging 15 per day for breakfast although eating outside was significantly cheaper. There was no explanation on how to reserve a place In the sky bar. Sky bar staff very rude and looked unhappy. Also, did not explain they you need to pay for food straight away, once food was severed.

Hotel in good location of KL The hotel was opposite a beautiful park and near a shopping centre and attractions so the location good There were fruit flies in the bathroom. There were open sections of the bathroom ceiling where you could see the plumbing or wherever it was behind the ceiling. There was a weird faint exhaust smell in the room when the air conditioning was switched off.
5 star hotel price but facility and service not match Clean, Bath room is good TV is old very only HD, not full HD, can not use for work as computer monitor Check in and check out too slow
better hotels in Kl location executive floor is rubbish could not get the porter to collect the bags on the arrival or departure

I was disappointed with the room cleanliness. The room didn t feel properly cleaned, and I noticed insects including some in the bathroom area . This made the stay less comfortable than expected, especially at this price range. The hotel facilities and staff were okay overall, but the room hygiene issue stood out negatively.

1. Checked in waited too long. almost 1 hour. 2. Room was assigned wrongly and we have to changed the room after shower and unpacked. 3. Breakfast is very lousy, eg. roti plata was not cooked well very hard , mee soup cannot be eaten very bitter , sushi rice roll cannot be eaten also rice not cooked, very hard . 4. The money I paid only worth for the location. The rest are nothing.
Very bad co operation. To much commercial behaviour.

Room was less attractive. No picture or any decoration for the room. Pale and simple. Disappointed with the Tv channels offering and there is no netflix at least some channels. Cocktail Drinks at sky bar overpriced as I felt the could do a better job rather than offering juice instead of cocktail. For Long Island tea they use bacardi instead of better rum brand for the price we pay.

Check in at 5pm, but the room is not ready!! Need to wait almost 2 hours for the room. Plus the reception is not helpful, did not mentioning which floor for the breakfast and others facilities. Really bad experience.

Overall is OK, but Reception is very poor. I wait around 3 hour to get my room but reception doesn t explain why. They give free upgrade to bigger rooms, but of course that window view change from park view to city view. park view need to pay extra . Bigger room but view was downgrade.

Breakfast was poor. The room had 2 single beds and one single sofa bed and we were 4 people so 2 people had to sleep on one single bed very tight and uncomfortable. The next room had a party at 3 am until 7 am and even though we complained twice still not really resolved the issue. We are glad that we stayed one night only and never come back.

The LIFT Service was exceptionally poor for their usual high standard. Had to wait really long for Lift going up or down! Never had this sort of poor situation with Lift for a high rise building before.

I booked the same room which I booked at the begging of my trip but this time without breakfast because I had very early flight so the hotel has downgraded my room to a very shabby , old dirty room .this room was not even up to the standards of 3 stars hotel

Air conditioning do not work properly, the room was hot and humid. The currency exchange do not go beyond 200. The food at the ghobi chit chat was disappointed, the room pretty small, day bed by the window really not a good idea, needed a table with the chair to be able to enjoy the view while drinking etc. the sky bar was so so, Hot and humid too over there, feel more like a sauna !

Had ants, loads of tiny ants. Complained to the staff, on different occasions but they did nothing about it. I ordered laundry in the early afternoon,by the evening the next days still not delivered. They wanted me to go down stairs to the first floor, pay for it then come back to my room and ask them to deliver it. Extremely inefficient. Eventually the delivered it and I just paid for it in my room, hours later. I stayed here in September without any major issues but this experience was bad enough to make me stay away for good

Beds suffer from accumulated dirt for years, and this is evident when reflected with the lighting of the room. Regardless of the outer layers that give you the impression of cleanliness, me and my family suffered a lot when I returned ,from skin rashes from these unclean covers. This is in addition to the dilapidated furniture that has not been renewed since years, and I believe that the hotel s excellent location necessitates the management to do some kind of comprehensive renovation in order for this hotel to have a five star rating and not rely on the location alone.
The check out took about 13 min and very poor communication with me
Supposed check in at 2pm but delayed until 4pm , room not ready, wasting time on waiting. No efficiency and keep guest waiting for too long is unacceptable

The management was poor, the room very noisy due to extremely loud aircon and a thumping bass from the Sky Bar bass at night club levels 2 floors above until 1am, no sound proofing, able unfortunately to hear everything your neighbours are doing in their bathroom as there's a connecting door again without sound proofing, TV quality is circa 2010, no HD, very limited choice and this a club room very poor.
Long check in time. Noisy workmen. Sky bar bad air con
This is the second time I've stayed and both times the rooms have not been ready at check in time. Just not good enough.

There s miss communication in checkin early which is confirm by the hotel earlier for addition charge of rm300. Room not ready until 1pm. Could have told us earlier for us to arrange another place to rest after a long flight. The bathroom is mouldy. You could look at other room guest sitting in the room sofa or bed we paid extra for twin tower view . We could hear the party music from the roof top bar in our room at midnight.
Old hotel with water dripping from the walls during heavy rains.
Breakfast buffer was underwhelming. Reception check in was taking too long
OLD FURNITURE NEED TO UPGRADE

Was expecting 5 star grand lobby but its just like apartment style .facilities on different floor but charges are high depending upon the other beautiful apartment with view ..why to spend so much money on this hotel ..I will never stay .would choose other options ..their shuttle buggy dropped us at surya mall but due to little rain they stopped buggy and didn't reply to our msg to pick up .other hotels buggy were still operating ,we kept waiting for their buggy but they didn't start and picked us up even when rain stopped so they r not reliable..view.from the room was amazing. Breakfast was tired .

Check in was very slow. No sense of welcome and no eye contact from the young man behind the desk, I think his name was Lai. He was all the time focusing on his PC it took forever. Mind you only two receptionist at around 12.30 were present wile guest were waiting in a queue for 20 minutes. Check out was quicker, with a bye bye and thank you. No body asked how was your stay or anything engaging. I must say a far cray from the excellent experience at the Double Tree by Hilton in Sha Alam.

it had a smoking floor. this exposes guests staying on that floor to thirdhand smoke. without a law prohibiting families with children from staying on that floor , children will be exposed. he buggy drivers plying the route from the hotel to suria klcc honk a lot despite the pathway being empty. these are public pathways and do not belong to traders hotel. as such these buggies do not have the right over pedestrians and certainly do not have the right to bully pedestrians by incessantly honking at them
Very cold atmosphere

Lousy TV Old, Small and is not smart TV with NETFLIX, DISNEY and etc. Toilet Light Not enough brightness Breakfast Too crowded like market, hot cholate machine spoiled nobody know how to fix it, lot of food finished and no top up refilled, carpet are dirty, food not tasty and repeatedly same... Swimming Pool Seem not hygiene, and only alcohol drinks serve... Should have coffee or fruit juices Room Not serving snacks, brew coffee machine or some drinks like other 5 stars hotel... and water bottles are too small and etc...

Very rude concierge. Don't know how to deal with guest. The buggy at suria mall didn't take us in when we stopped him 5metres from the pick up point. He told us walk to the pick point then I'll take you. We decided to walk back and on his way back when he saw us still walking, he didn't even bother to stop. When we went to complain to the hotel, they said this is how it works!! Like really?? I work in this industry for years now and this is not the standard of a Shangri La Hotel.

Disorganised front desk. Arrangements we made before hand regarding an extra bed were not done when we arrived which was very late at night with 2 children. It still took over 45 minutes to check in and get a bed and towels sorted which after a long haul flight was frustrating especially as we deliberately made prior to check in. Check out was also extremely disorganised with a 20 minute delay and a huge queue.
Out of date.. need renovation
It was a very plain room and the extra bed not very good. Skybar was also not impressive.

The checkin was slow, and I and my family had to wait for a couple of hours just to get the room, and I got my room. The carpet was wet. All three rooms were all on different floors. I had already booked all three rooms together. In one of the rooms, we requested an extra bed. What we received was a sofa they had just put a bed covered on it. We had already paid an extra 50RM per night. And the worst thing is we had waited till midnight, then the extra bed came after we had to go down to the reception to get it done again. The duty manager was not efficient when when we told her about it we had to inform her about the rooms a couple of times. The in room entertainment TV was outdated. As we had just come from a nother hotel Malaysia.
Very basic room, small, terrible decor, poor view.

Poor Management! 1. Room Availability I didn t get my room until 6 PM, even though I arrived in the afternoon. I had to make a big fuss and ask for a late checkout just to get some sort of compensation for the wait. I get that it was peak season, but the management really dropped the ball here. 2. Fire Alarm Incident On my last day, the fire alarm went off at 6 45 AM. The communication was a mess the speakers weren t working, and we couldn t understand what was being said. When we got to the assembly point, there was no clear info. We had to figure things out from a security guard and concierge who were just as lost as we were. No one from management came to explain anything, and they didn t even bother sending an email to apologize after the false alarm. I had my two young kids with me, and it was super stressful! I was truly disappointed. I didn t think the Shangri La chain would let me down like this.

They didn t mention that there would be a surchage to be able to use the facility while we were booking, we booked a year in advance and got cancelled our booking 1 month before we had to rebook at ahigher rate, we had to call to get the room serviced as it was not done in a timely maner. The last day they ruined the suitcases with pink stains from their storage and the suitcases were brand new.

We stayed 4 nights in a suite. Unfortunately, the room felt small for a suite, and the air conditioning blows directly on the bed, which was very uncomfortable at night. Breakfast was disappointing. On Level 5, where everyone can go, the food quality was poor, the variety very limited, and the taste was honestly awful. The Level 32 restaurant was much better, but it shouldn t take a premium upgrade to get a decent breakfast in a hotel of this standard. The hotel provides a buggy service to Suria Shopping Center, which is convenient, but if it rains, the service stops. For a city hotel, this seems like poor planning, as rain is quite common in Kuala Lumpur. Overall, the location is great and the views are nice, but the service and facilities did not meet expectations for the price.

I m very disappointed with Shangri La Hotels. I booked the most expensive room at Traders Hotel through Booking.com to celebrate my wife s first birthday after our wedding, and requested 1. Airport pickup 2. Surprise cake at check in both to be paid on arrival . We waited over 2 hours at the airport but no pickup came, and no one answered our calls. When we arrived by taxi at 9pm, the room was still not ready check in time is 2pm . At the front desk, they even asked if we had a reservation. The surprise cake request was completely ignored. Later they offered it in the morning but directly told my wife, ruining the surprise. I paid about 400 for just 15 hours of stay, and the experience was very disappointing.

Perfect location next to the twin towers and surrounding area breakfast was brilliant so much to choose from the staff were amazing, our hotel room was a very good size but room was tied needed a make over not what you expect from a 5 star hotel, room service was very poor quality chip very greasy , chicken burger was very cold and greasy chicken over cooked , Caesar salad was what was very poor standard chicken tough and over cooked like rubber my club sandwich very unpleasant to eat all three of could not the food , I have stayed at many 5star hotels over the world I have never had food you can not eat even chew , I am a Shanghai la gold member and I am never going to stay with the again I will be cancelling my membership very so because after reporting the issue they just brush under the carpet , I have even cancelled my return reservation which I was going to stay for one extra week

My experience was significantly marred by multiple issues. Firstly, the windows of adjacent rooms are positioned extremely close together, offering very little privacy and requiring the curtains to be drawn at all times. Secondly, I was concerned about the level of cleanliness, as there were insects in the room. Most importantly, the hotel s inability to provide a proper invoice after my stay was completely unacceptable. I requested an invoice both before arrival and at check out, and was initially assured it would be provided. However, I was then informed that the hotel could not issue the invoice and that I should contact Booking.com. Booking.com has since confirmed that the responsibility for providing the invoice lies with the hotel. Despite numerous follow up requests, neither I nor my colleagues have received an invoice, and the hotel either ignores our inquiries or provides empty promises that it will be resolved soon. This lack of proper documentation is unacceptable and creates significant inconvenience for business travelers. While I appreciated the hotel s location, I cannot recommend it due to these serious issues.
Very slow response. Requesting invoice until.i have not received it

Compared to a 4 star hotel, it doesn't live up for my expectation. The room was quite basic, not too small but not too big. They have a sky bar and it's super loud until midnight. We are on 23rd floor and it's on 33 floor but we can hear the music! Other noises also annoyed us when the staff cleaned arranged towels right outside our door around 8pm! The furniture chair, desk, mat... is old. The water has some clo weird smell. I gave it 2 stars just because of the location, otherwise it's one 1 star. I couldn't believe it's under Shangri la group.

I booked a room a month and a half in advance and asked several times to be given a high floor. They answered of course. BUT, upon arrival, we were given the lowest floor and of course the mood was spoiled! I asked to change the number, to which I was answered, there are no numbers. BUT when I was there, other guests were given a high floor. I did not expect such an attitude from a 5 star hotel! I won't come back here anymore, the staff is inattentive!!!!!! Old furniture and as my opinion its not a 5 star jotel.

It was a holiday weekend and they didn't have enough staff to clean the room and turn them around. We didn't get our room until 8pm! They gave us free snacks and late checkout till 3pm, but 8pm is still beyond acceptable.
Good location, Bad overall experience from unacceptable hotel management.
Lots of IT problems not for business travellers
